description: Using Fitz’s compass method, the team locates the heavily-guarded room containing the EMP generator. Yo-Yo uses her powers to disarm the Watchdog guards, and the team disables the device, ending the blackout and restoring power to affected cities. The scene is tense and action-packed as they move quickly to prevent further disaster.

transcript.line: Looks empty. You sure this is the right place?
I said I'd get us in the ballpark.
Well, the good news is, Fitz was right. The EMP is here.
Yeah, the bad news is, we're out-gunned.
Okay. All set. Let there be light.
So many people looking for an excuse to hate.
It's spreading. Passports, visas. Somebody's taken the Watchdogs global. Yeah, this is Agent Coulson. Get me the Director. We have a solve.
